title: Resolution Approving the Supplemental Investment Program (SIP) for Cy 2022 Amounting to One Million Pesos and 00/100 (P 1,000,000.00) Chargeable Against the General Fund Realignment From the General Services Office in Particular for Security Services to the Office of the Mayor - Public Safety Office to Defray Expenses for the Operationalization of Municipal Peace and Order (TANODS) Task Force. (AUTHOR: COUNCILOR JONATHAN BRYAN S. SIYTIAP, 8/15/2022)
